creator: garbanzo@hooked.net
text:
A fairly useful function strsignal(), which will take a signal
number and return a string describing it, is missing.  Attached at the
bottom is a uuencoded tar.gz file with the files from strerror, hacked up
to work as strsignal.  Perhaps something similar to this could be included
w/ -current.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Compile a program that uses strsignal().
